_comment: Drop this block under the top-level 'mcpServers' key in your Claude Desktop config (macOS: ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json; or for Claude Code: ~/.claude/config.json). See docs/mcp.md for full instructions.

_option_a_pypi_install._note: Once patha-memory is published to pypi, this is the one-line install.

_option_b_local_checkout._note: For a local clone of github.com/autotelicbydesign/patha. Replace PROJECT_PATH with the absolute path to your clone. Fastest first-run: uses stub detector (no 1.7 GB download). Upgrade to full-stack-v7 once you've confirmed it works.

patha._note: Copy EITHER option_a OR option_b above, rename to 'patha', and delete these placeholder keys. This is just the shape the final config should have.
